title: Hydrogen adsorption in different carbon nanostructures
material_description: Activated carbon, similar to AX-21, from coke + KOH; doubled SSA vs regular-grade porous carbon
source_location: Abstract & Section 3 p.2212 ("about 4.5 wt% at 77 K", Langmuir saturation); Table 1 p.2210; Fig.2a plateau ~40-60 bar
notes: 77 K Langmuir saturation; uptake_type unspecified (paper states neither excess nor absolute); micropore vol = pore vol for pores <1.3 nm diameter (Table 1)

title: Hydrogen adsorption in different carbon nanostructures
material_description: Activated carbon, similar to AX-21, from coke + KOH; doubled SSA vs regular-grade porous carbon

title: Hydrogen adsorption in different carbon nanostructures

notes: 77 K Langmuir saturation; digitized from Fig.2b (WebPlotDigitizer), cross-checked vs Fig.3; uptake_type unspecified
